description: An AI-powered task-management system you can drop into Cursor, Lovable, Windsurf, Roo, and others.

findings.title: Supply Chain CVE: GHSA-g9mf-h72j-4rw9 in undici@7.16.0
findings.recommendation: Upgrade undici to a version that resolves GHSA-g9mf-h72j-4rw9. Check https://osv.dev/vulnerability/GHSA-g9mf-h72j-4rw9 for patched versions. Enable Dependabot or OSV-Scanner in CI to catch future CVEs automatically.
